projectDescription: A full-stack Next.js e-commerce storefront that lets shoppers browse categories, filter products by size and color, preview items, and manage a persistent shopping cart.
keyFeatures: Dynamic product catalog with category-based navigation
Billboard/hero banners per category and homepage
Product filtering by size and color (desktop and mobile)
Product detail page with image gallery and suggested products
Persistent shopping cart powered by Zustand and localStorage
Quick-preview modal for products without leaving the listing
publicApiSurface: GET /products — fetch products with optional categoryId, colorId, sizeId, isFeatured filters
GET /products/:id — fetch a single product by ID
GET /billboards/:id — fetch a billboard by ID
useCart() — Zustand store: { items, addItem, removeItem, removeAll }
usePreviewModal() — Zustand store: { isOpen, data, onOpen, onClose }
